# MuleSoft Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.6) of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector 2.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector 2.6 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector-examples.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector 2.6 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector 2.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector 2.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector 2.6 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector-xml-maven.md)
